api.byoa_upgrade: Bring Your Own API (BYOA) keys require Pro plan ($12/mo) or higher. Upgrade in workspace settings.
api.conversation_upgrade: Conversation API requires Team plan ($29/mo). Team includes: external bot integration (Telegram, Slack), REST API, webhooks, and custom AI instructions.
api.key_id_required: Workspace ID and key ID are required.
api.provider_key_required: AI provider and API key are required.
api.unsupported_provider: This AI provider is not supported. Please use a supported provider.
api.webhooks_upgrade: Outbound webhooks require Team plan ($29/mo). Team includes: event notifications to external services, deploy hooks for Vercel/Netlify, and Slack integration.
auth.code_or_token_required: Authentication code or access token is required. Please try signing in again.
auth.email_required: Email address is required to send a magic link.
auth.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
auth.invalid_provider: Invalid authentication provider. Please use GitHub or Google to sign in.
auth.invalid_state: Invalid or expired authentication state. Please try signing in again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.session_invalid: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
auth.unauthorized: You are not signed in. Please sign in to continue.
branches.contentrain_only: Only contentrain/ branches can be managed through Studio.
branches.merge_forbidden: You do not have permission to merge branches in this project.
branches.reject_forbidden: You do not have permission to reject branches in this project.
cdn.content_not_found: The requested content was not found in CDN storage.
cdn.key_expired: This API key has expired. Please generate a new one in project settings.
cdn.key_invalid: Invalid or missing API key. Please check your API key and try again.
cdn.key_mismatch: The API key does not match this project.
cdn.key_name_required: A name is required when creating an API key.
cdn.not_enabled: CDN is not enabled for this project. Enable it in project settings.
cdn.origin_not_allowed: Your request origin is not in the allowed origins list for this API key.
cdn.path_required: A content path is required to fetch CDN content.
cdn.storage_not_configured: CDN storage is not configured. Contact your administrator to set up storage credentials.
cdn.upgrade: CDN delivery requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: 20GB bandwidth, API key management, automatic builds on content change, and ETag caching.
chat.conversation_create_failed: Failed to create a new conversation. Please try again.
chat.conversation_not_found: Conversation not found. It may have been deleted.
chat.monthly_limit_reached: Monthly message limit reached ({limit} messages). Upgrade your plan for more.
chat.no_api_key: No AI API key is configured. Add one in workspace settings to enable chat.
chat.no_permissions: You do not have permission to use chat in this project.
chat.rate_limited: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in {seconds}s
content.insufficient_permissions: You do not have sufficient permissions for this content operation.
content.not_found: Content not found for this model and locale.
content.publish_owner_only: Only workspace owners and admins can publish content.
content.validation_failed: Content validation failed. Please check the required fields and field types.
content.write_forbidden: You do not have permission to write content in this project.
generic.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
github.installation_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch GitHub installation details. Please try again.
github.installation_id_invalid: The GitHub installation ID is not valid.
github.installation_id_missing: GitHub installation ID is missing from the request.
github.installation_linked: This GitHub App installation is already linked to another workspace.
github.installation_missing: GitHub App is not installed for this workspace. Install it from workspace settings.
github.owner_not_resolved: Could not determine the GitHub account for this installation. Please reinstall the GitHub App.
github.repo_exists: A repository with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
github.repo_name_invalid: Invalid repository name. Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
github.repo_permission_denied: The GitHub App does not have permission to create repositories. Please update the App permissions in GitHub settings.
github.scan_params_required: Workspace ID, repository owner, and repository name are required.
github.template_params_required: Workspace ID, template repository, and name are required.
github.workspace_not_found: No workspace found for this GitHub installation.
forms.captcha_failed: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
forms.form_disabled: This form is not currently accepting submissions.
forms.invalid_status: Status must be approved, rejected, or spam.
forms.monthly_limit: Monthly submission limit reached. Please try again next month.
forms.not_collection: Forms can only be enabled on collection models.
forms.rate_limited: Too many submissions. Please try again later.
media.asset_not_found: Media asset not found. It may have been deleted.
media.bulk_params_required: Action and asset IDs are required for bulk operations.
media.bulk_tags_required: Tags are required for the tag action.
media.file_field_required: A file field is required for upload.
media.file_not_found_storage: The file was not found in storage. It may have been removed.
media.library_upgrade: Media library requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: Asset Manager with 5GB storage, image optimization, variant generation, and CDN delivery. Upgrade in workspace settings.
media.no_file_provided: No file was provided for upload.
media.storage_not_configured: Media storage is not configured. Contact your administrator to set up R2 storage credentials.
media.upload_upgrade: Media upload requires Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes: image upload, optimization, variant generation (hero, card, thumb, og sizes), and CDN delivery. For now, you can use external image URLs (Unsplash, etc) directly in content fields.
media.url_fetch_failed: Failed to download the file from the provided URL. Please check the URL and try again.
media.url_required: A URL is required for URL-based upload.
members.cannot_change_owner_role: The workspace owner's role cannot be changed.
members.cannot_remove_owner: The workspace owner cannot be removed.
members.could_not_invite: Could not find or invite this user. Please check the email address.
members.invalid_project_role: Role must be editor, reviewer, or viewer.
members.invalid_workspace_role: Role must be admin or member.
members.model_access_upgrade: Model-specific access control requires Pro plan ($12/mo) or higher. Upgrade in workspace settings.
members.not_found: Member not found in this workspace.
members.reviewer_upgrade: Reviewer role requires Pro plan ($12/mo) or higher. Upgrade in workspace settings.
members.seat_limit_reached: Team member limit reached ({limit}). Upgrade your plan to invite more members.
members.viewer_upgrade: Viewer role requires Pro plan ($12/mo) or higher. Upgrade in workspace settings.
members.workspace_limit_reached: Team member limit reached for your plan. Upgrade to invite more members.
model.access_denied: You don't have access to this model. Your role is restricted to specific models.
model.not_found: Content model not found. It may have been deleted or renamed.
project.config_not_found: Project configuration file (.contentrain/config.json) not found in the repository.
project.not_found: Project not found or you don't have access.
project.not_found_in_workspace: Project not found in this workspace. It may have been moved or deleted.
project.review_workflow_upgrade: Review workflow requires Pro plan ($12/mo) or higher. Upgrade in workspace settings.
project.settings_owner_only: Only workspace owners and admins can change project settings.
rate.limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
storage.quota_exceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Upgrade your plan for more storage or delete unused assets.
upload.file_too_large: File exceeds the size limit for your plan. Pro: 10MB, Team: 50MB, Enterprise: 100MB.
upload.type_not_allowed: This file type is not allowed. Supported: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, AVIF, SVG, MP4, WebM, PDF.
validation.branch_params_required: Workspace ID, Project ID, and branch name are required.
validation.email_role_required: Email address and role are required to invite a member.
validation.entry_status_required: Entry IDs and target status are required.
validation.message_required: Workspace ID, Project ID, and message are required to start a chat.
validation.model_id_required: Workspace ID, Project ID, and Model ID are required.
validation.name_slug_required: Workspace name and slug are required.
validation.no_fields_to_update: No fields provided to update. Please specify at least one field to change.
validation.params_required: Required parameters are missing. Please check your request.
validation.project_id_required: Workspace ID and Project ID are required.
validation.repo_required: Repository name is required to connect a project.
validation.status_invalid: Status must be draft, published, or archived.
validation.terms_required: Terms object is required to update vocabulary.
vocabulary.modify_forbidden: You do not have sufficient permissions to modify the project vocabulary.
webhook.invalid_signature: Webhook signature verification failed. The request may have been tampered with.
webhook.missing_signature: Webhook signature is missing from the request.
webhook.secret_not_configured: Webhook secret is not configured on the server.
workspace.cannot_delete_primary: Your primary workspace cannot be deleted.
workspace.limit_reached: Workspace limit reached ({limit}). Upgrade your plan for more workspaces.
workspace.not_a_member: You are not a member of this workspace.
workspace.not_found: Workspace not found or you don't have access.
workspace.owner_only_delete: Only the workspace owner can delete this workspace.
workspace.slug_taken: This workspace slug is already taken. Please choose a different one.
workspace.slug_too_short: Workspace slug must be at least 2 characters.
